task: Phase 13 v0.1.14 — Toss UX Writing 톤 migration (Tier A+B+C+D = runtime+commands+install/hook+tests+lint). Plan: .omc/plans/phase-13-toss-tone-migration-v2.md (ralplan round 2/5 APPROVE). Phase 14+15 deferred (docs + SKILL descriptions).

stories.title: Lint infrastructure — check-toss-tone-conformance.ts + check-skill-keywords-preserved.ts (PR1 commit 1 prerequisite)
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/check-toss-tone-conformance.ts (NEW) — scans Phase 13 file scope (catalog.ts, keychain*.ts, list-deployments.ts, index.ts USAGE/cmdSessionStart, commands/*.md, bin/install.{sh,ps1}, hooks/session-start.{sh,ps1}). Forbidden tokens: 합니다, 입니다, 시겠어요, 시나요, 당신, 아이고, 드립니다 (with 시나요? T-06 3-exception verbatim from Toss guide).
scripts/check-skill-keywords-preserved.ts (NEW) — baseline snapshot of nl-lexicon.md user-utterance phrases AND SKILL.md description quoted phrases. PR2 must show diff = 0.
tests/lint-toss-tone.test.ts (NEW) — assertion: both scripts run, --strict mode supported, baseline file exists.
package.json scripts.lint:tone = 'bun scripts/check-toss-tone-conformance.ts --strict'.
Commit 1 baseline: source unchanged, scripts run, baseline = current count of violations (warn-only baseline mode).
Documentation in scripts/ headers: which files in scope, which tokens forbidden, why each (link to Toss T-NN rules).
bun test lint-toss-tone → green.

stories.title: catalog.ts 13 entries → Toss 4-part 톤 (Tier A core)
acceptanceCriteria: catalog.ts 13 exit-code entries: 어미 100% 해요체, 직접 호칭 (당신) 0회, 부정형 → 긍정형, emotion prefix (잠깐만요/괜찮아요/축하해요) 보존.
취소 → 닫기 decision tree per §6: 5× 취소 → 닫기, 1× 취소 retain (FORCE_DOWNGRADE destructive abort).
tests/classify-exit.test.ts 39 assertion update + green.
bun lint:tone --strict on catalog.ts → 0 violation.
axhub-helpers classify-exit live sample for codes 65/66/68 captured to .omc/evidence/phase-13-classify-exit-samples.txt.
4-part structure (감정/원인/해결/다음) 보존 — codegen.test.ts snapshot regenerate + green.

stories.title: Keychain 4-part Toss 톤 (keychain.ts + keychain-windows.ts)
acceptanceCriteria: keychain.ts 7 errors + keychain-windows.ts 5 errors → Toss 톤.
아이고 deprecated → 잠깐만요 또는 이상해요 통일.
tests/keychain.test.ts emotion prefix regex `/잠깐만요|이상해요/` (drop 아이고) + green.
tests/keychain-windows.test.ts kernel keyword retain checks green (보안 솔루션, Authenticode, AXHUB_TOKEN).
4-part structure 보존 — semantic kernel preserved per error path.
bun lint:tone --strict on keychain*.ts → 0 violation.

stories.title: List-deployments + index.ts USAGE Toss 톤
acceptanceCriteria: list-deployments.ts 7 strings (auth error, token-missing fallback, parse failures) → Toss.
index.ts cmdSessionStart Korean message + USAGE description Toss.
tests/list-deployments.test.ts toContain assertions update + green.
axhub-helpers token-init + axhub-helpers list-deployments stdout sample captured.
bun lint:tone --strict on both files → 0 violation.

stories.title: 9 slash commands + help.md menu Toss 톤
acceptanceCriteria: commands/{deploy,status,logs,apps,apis,doctor,login,update,help}.md description 한 줄 → Toss.
help.md 21줄 menu Toss (자연어 예시 따옴표 = 발화 lexicon UNCHANGED).
/axhub:help via subprocess claude -p captured to .omc/evidence/phase-13-help-after.txt + diff vs Phase 12 baseline.
tests/manifest.test.ts command description structure tests green (prefix 'This skill'/'이 스킬' lint untouched per F4).
bun lint:tone --strict on commands/*.md → 0 violation.

stories.title: Install + hook system message Toss (Tier D)
acceptanceCriteria: bin/install.sh 12 Korean lines + bin/install.ps1 5 multi-line + hooks/session-start.sh 2 + hooks/session-start.ps1 8 → Toss.
Korean error messages 4-part structure 보존 (Tier D 도 information density 유지).
tests/install.test.sh + tests/install-ps1.test.ts + tests/session-start-ps1.test.ts grep assertions update + green.
bun test → 394 baseline pass count (or higher with new lint test) — no regression.
bun lint:tone --strict on install/hook files → 0 violation.
